description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events to dev, release, and prerelease branches, excluding paths under docs/ and mkdocs.yml. Use a matrix job that runs on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest, building and testing .NET solutions Mutagen.Records.sln and Mutagen.Records.Linux.sln with specific exclusions. The job should check out the code, clean and restore NuGet packages, build the solutions in Release configuration, and run tests.
